layout.hero: Centered DX face, headline, platform download cards, CTAs, proof cards, and stats.
layout.sections: Full-width dark bands with max-width content, feature banners with real thumbnail assets, data tables, cards, and CTA.
layout.responsive: Cards collapse from multi-column grids to one or two columns under tablet and mobile breakpoints.

accessibility_notes: Platform cards are links with visible text labels.
Feature images include descriptive alt text.
honest_gaps: The DX face is a CSS recreation, not the animated React/GSAP face.
Hover cards are simplified into direct visible platform cards.
GSAP/Motion animations are not ported because this route is intentionally no-runtime DX-WWW source proof.
Runtime screenshot and performance proof still require an approved preview run.
